Video.summary: Michael and Larken travel to South Carolina's Lowcountry for a massive barbecue charity event supporting children battling serious illness. After serving up smoke for a great cause, they spend an extra day in the marsh chasing redfish and speckled trout.
Video.title: "Holy Smokes"

Video.summary: We are blessed today to hunt with Cole Dutton for the Inaugural Pierce Dutton Memorial Hunt. We are honored to spend a weekend with Cole and his family at the G2 Ranch. Disabled Outdoorsman has played a huge part in getting those less fortunate outdoors. We are truly blessed to be able to follow along and capture these great moments.
Video.title: "Cole Dutton"

Video.summary: Willi and Chris have hunted NM for years with some success each year. This year they include two new friends, Nick Ventura and his dad. They receive rain like they never had before and when they finally make it out to hunt, Willi is hoping to connect.
Video.title: "Willi's New Mexico Thunder Bull"

Video.summary: David Blanton heads to Mississippi to hunt his friend Richard Reid's property. Setting up in the dark proves to make the difference as the birds fly down into the field!
Video.title: Spring Thunder - "David Mississippi"

Video.summary: We set out to tell the tale of Marion - and his legendary Mack’s Prairie Wings, smack dab in the middle of the world famous Stuttgart, Arkansas - the land of ducks and rice. Get an inside look at a man that many consider to be larger than life, from those that knew him best, like his cousin and fellow hell raiser, Bud McCollum. We’ll even hear a story or two from Milton Stovesand, an 81 year old former waterfowl guide and Mack’s employee who actually guided John Olin a time or two, and ran the timber holes with Marion. It’s timber holes and tall tales. It’s cups of coffee and cupped up wings. It’s partners in business, and partners in potholes and it’s pure Arkansas...just like Marion.
Video.title: “The Legend of Stuttgart”

Video.summary: Embark on a journey through Scotland's hunting traditions, exploring bird shoots, grouse moors, and red stag hunts while discovering the evolving role of hunting in conservation.
Video.title: "Scotland’s Hunting Tradition"

Video.summary: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor take Sergeant Major (r) Jamey Caldwell fishing out of Hawks Cay for some grouper and tarpon action in the Florida Keys.
Video.title: "Grouper and Tarpon with Jamey Caldwell"

Video.summary: Sergeant Major (r) Jamey Caldwell brings some game changing technology along as he joins Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor for some nighttime tarpon fishing at the Long Key Bridge.
Video.title: "Night Vision Tarpon with Jamey Caldwell"

Video.summary: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor are joined by Florida Keys guide Sam Milazzo to find the elusive daytime Swordfish but run into some great Dolphin fishing on the way.
Video.title: "Dolphin and Swordfish with Sam Milazzo"

Video.summary: "Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor patiently pursue big tarpon from the Everglades to the Middle Keys with fly rod in hand."
Video.title: "Fly Fishing Tour of the Keys"

Video.summary: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor are joined by Florida Keys guide Richard Black for an exciting adventure in Key Largo, catching a wide variety of fish species on the shallow reef.
Video.title: "Key Largo with Richard Black"

Video.summary: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor are joined by Florida Keys guide Jeff Malone to find a frenzy of exciting Bluefish near Marathon, FL.
Video.title: "Bluefish with Jeff Malone"

Video.summary: Michael and Larken Letchworth set out on a new adventure, exploring food fishing and the great outdoors. This father son duo are making memories that will last a lifetime and will forever be etched in the digital world.
Video.title: "The Beginning"

Video.summary: Ismael Garcia was just a young soldier when a tragic incident in Afghanistan changed his life forever. He was left wounded and scarred, but the hardest part came after he returned home. Hunting had always been his escape. But after war, everything felt different — until he picked up a bow.
Video.title: "SOLITUDE"

Video.summary: The boys are at the Dirty Bird in Oklahoma getting the Oklahoma turkey season kicked off.
Video.title: "Turkey Camp At The Dirty Bird"

Video.summary: Roger Culpepper takes Sophia Mahlke and her dad Tom to kill her first longbeard. The guys and girl find the gobblers on roost in a beautiful Georgia hardwood bottom and make their move.
Video.title: Spring Thunder - "Georgia Opening Day"

Video.summary: The Spring Thunder crew teams up with the guys from Hunt Club and Realtree Roadtrips to take a group of veterans on a life changing turkey hunt at Redstone Arsenal in Huntsville, AL.
Video.title: Spring Thunder - "Veterans Hunt"

Video.summary: Justin Webb heads to Tennessee to hunt with Phillip Culpepper, hoping to get an Eastern in his quest for a Grand Slam. Next stop - Wyoming for a Merriam.
Video.title: Spring Thunder - "Big Eastern Dreams"

Video.summary: When tarpon don’t cooperate, it’s time for Capt. Justin and friend Ethan Register to have a competition for dinner options in the gulf’s grocery store.
Video.title: "Once Upon a Wahoo"

Video.summary: A remnant of the last Ice Age, the musk ox is almost mythical in appearance. For the people who share the Barren Ground region of Canada with them, they are an integral part of their culture. Show host, Dan Cabela, participates in a scientific sampling project to monitor the - population's health, and get first-hand experience of the relationship between local people and this arctic icon.
Video.title: "Barren Ground Musk Ox"

Video.summary: Will Cooper finally trades 3 years of tough times for triumph in his quest to tag an out-of-state buck with a bow.
Video.title: "Nine Lives"

Video.summary: Capt. Mike joins Capt. Ozzie in Captiva, FL where the action is fast and furious and they chase down an inshore slam in this beautiful Florida fishery.
Video.title: "Captiva Slam"

Video.summary: In this episode of Goin' Coastal, Captain Josh and Anna Calhoon set out for some fun Flounder fishing. They enjoy a delicious hook & cook served up fresh from their day at AJ's!
Video.title: "Florida Pounder"

Video.summary: Capt. Jared Raskob joins Key West Guide Capt. Nick LaBadie on a quest for a Keys Grand Slam.
Video.title: "Key West Slam"

Video.summary: Capt. Jared Raskob and long time friend and tournament angler Mitch Widom have a fly rod in hand and go in search of tarpon in Islamorada.
Video.title: "Mitch"

Video.summary: CA heads to Jupiter to fish with Ryan Nitz for giant snook.
Video.title: "Bait Boys"

Video.summary: PCB’s white sand beaches are jam-packed with visitors soaking up sun - and surf while Justin and Meredith chase schools of migrating tarpon - just offshore. How often do those two worlds collide?
Video.title: "Tarpon Town"

Video.summary: Renowned hunter Mark Kayser faces one of his most challenging hunts yet in the sparse woodlands of Nebraska.
Video.title: "Low Density"

Video.summary: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor use Lowrance Active Target all day to find fish, first targeting bridge tarpon then finding a variety of species in Florida Bay mullet muds.
Video.title: "Bridge to Mullet Muds"

Video.summary: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor chase Tarpon of all sizes around Florida Bay and the Everglades.
Video.title: "Tarpon Bites"

Video.summary: After booking a trip at the last Indian River Clam Restoration banquete, the guys at Gold Key Roofing got a chance to fish with Capt. Blair and Capt. Mike Frenette.
Video.title: s - "Gold Key Roof"

Video.summary: Capt. Jason Dozier takes a trip out of Sebastian Inlet with Capt. Glyn Austin looking to catch Sharks, Tarpon, and anything else that bites.
Video.title: "Beach Giants"

Video.summary: The Local Knowledge crew FINALLY make it to the Bahamas and the incredible Green Turtle Club for a week of fishing, diving, and exploring the Abaco Island chain. With two incredible boats at our disposal, we make the 200 mile crossings from Miami and Cape Canaveral to rendezvous at Green Turtle Cay. Stay tuned for Part one of our Bahamas adventure!
Video.title: "The Green Turtle Club Part 1"

Video.summary: The Green Turtle Cay adventure continues as the LK crew uncovers more of what the incredible out islands of the Bahamas have to offer. Shifting gears to bottom fishing, Ali catches a fish of a lifetime while Rush gets to dive and spearfish with the locals.
Video.title: "The Green Turtle Club Part 2"

Video.summary: Back in San Diego and with Rockfish on the mind, the LK crew fish new grounds and depths to catch these iconic Southern California bottom fish. Along for the ride is pro snowboarder and friend Dave Downing to round out this epic rock cod fishing trip.
Video.title: "Deep Drop Rockfish"

Video.summary: With the drastic changes in the Southern California fishery over the past several years, it has been easy to get fixated on targeting large Bluefin tuna and going all out on what many have coined "big fish" fishing. On this episode Ali and Rush take advantage of the many other opportunities this time of year has to offer and switch focus back to the basics, targeting smaller yellowfin, bluefin, and mahi on bait.
Video.title: "SoCal Small Tuna"

Video.summary: Willi and Tom Petry meet in Iowa with good friends, the Wrights to hunt turkeys on their farms. Willi and Tom drew the first season in Iowa and had the first kick at the cat for the spring. They had hunted deer with Cody and Cassie but neither had hunted turkeys in Iowa. They are hoping for a little luck with the gobblers, and they know they are going to have a good time trying.
Video.title: "Iowa Turkey, .410's and Reapers"

Video.summary: David Blanton and Mike Chamberlin have 2 incredible late season hunts in South Dakota. A flock comes into the hen decoy and a Jake trying to breed the decoy drives the Toms insane!
Video.title: Spring Thunder - "David South Dakota"

Video.summary: Rusty Creasey joins the Spring Thunder crew for an incredible turkey hunt in Oklahoma. The guys are blessed to fill 6 tags in a short time and have several memorable hunts.
Video.title: Spring Thunder - "Oklahoma"

Video.summary: Justin and Brandi with Big Dreams Outdoors finish up their slam hunting Merriam turkeys with 7J Outfitters in Wyoming. It was a tough week for Justin but persistence pays off!
Video.title: Spring Thunder - "Big Merriam Dreams"

Video.summary: The Boss Hen, Jill Slocumb, from Realtree hunts for her first Turkey in years with Phillip Culpepper in Tennessee!
Video.title: Spring Thunder - "Boss HEN | Turkey Hunting Tennessee w/ Phillip Culpepper | Spring Thunder"

Image.alt: Spring Thunder - "Boss HEN | Turkey Hunting Tennessee w/ Phillip Culpepper | Spring Thunder"
Spring Thunder - "Boss HEN | Turkey Hunting Tennessee w/ Phillip Culpepper | Spring Thunder"
Spring Thunder - "Boss HEN | Turkey Hunting Tennessee w/ Phillip Culpepper | Spring Thunder"

Video.summary: On this weeks episode of Hunting Land Man, Slade and his daughter Asa take on the turkey woods together for the first time. As this is Asa's first time turkey hunting some quick pre hunt preparations are in order. Slade also was able to sit down with a good friend and registered forester to talk fire and the benefits of fire in land management. The next day, Asa and Slade were able to connect with a thundering tom as Asa punched her first ever turkey tag!
Video.title: "Asa's First Turkey!"

Video.summary: On this episode of Hunting Land Man, Slade, Ryan and Bearcub take on the midwest! After some tough hunting, the group is able to make a move to get in position on a BIG midwestern gobbler! Bearcub was able to harvest him after working the bird for almost 45 minutes! Slade and Ryan also do some Pre-Deer season work, and establish where the fall food-plots will be!
Video.title: "Missouri Turkey Tour!!"

Video.summary: Spring Thunder's Phillip Culpepper turkey hunts Wisconsin for late-season gobblers with United Country's Travis Hamele. They have an incredible hunt, and turkeys fall from the skies.
Video.title: "An Airborne Longbeard Double | Wisconsin Turkey Hunting"

Image.alt: "An Airborne Longbeard Double | Wisconsin Turkey Hunting"
"An Airborne Longbeard Double | Wisconsin Turkey Hunting"
"An Airborne Longbeard Double | Wisconsin Turkey Hunting"

Video.summary: Join host Brad Rucks for a thrilling turkey hunting adventure across three unforgettable outings. He starts off solo, setting the tone with a determined first hunt. Next, he teams up with JJ from Federal Ammunition. Finally, Brad’s son Noah joins in for a memorable hunt of his own, bringing the journey full circle.
Video.title: "Tungsten Thunder"

Video.summary: CA Richardson travels to Wrightsville Beach, NC to fish for flounder with renowned guide Jot Owens, breaking down key techniques along the way.
Video.title: "A Passion for Flounder"

Video.summary: In 2010, Amberly Snyder’s life changed forever when an accident left her paralyzed from the waist-down. Her comeback story not unlike something you’d see in a movie…in fact it inspired one. Disabled Outdoorsmen USA contacted TTHA and set up this hunt and we were fortunate enough to be able to capture just some of Amberly’s story and her harvest of a beautiful Axis buck at the G2 Ranch in the spring of 2022.
Video.title: "Walk, Ride, Rodeo…Hunt"

Video.summary: No roads. No shortcuts. This was a true backcountry elk hunt in the deep New Mexico wilderness—packed in on horseback, living out of camp, and chasing bugling bulls from daylight to dark. With bows in hand and rutting elk all around us, nearly every day brought close encounters, intense calling sequences, and heart-pounding moments at full draw.
Video.title: "Into The Deadfall | Archery Elk Deep in the New Mexico Wilderness"

Image.alt: "Into The Deadfall | Archery Elk Deep in the New Mexico Wilderness"
"Into The Deadfall | Archery Elk Deep in the New Mexico Wilderness"
"Into The Deadfall | Archery Elk Deep in the New Mexico Wilderness"

Video.summary: It’s opening morning of turkey season in the hills of Tennessee and we’re set up on the X. Gobblers are on fire and ready to dance. When the Turkey POSSE and the Pleasure Gang get together, we have a good time!
Video.title: "Turkey Hunting in Tennessee with the Pleasure Gang"

Image.alt: "Turkey Hunting in Tennessee with the Pleasure Gang"
"Turkey Hunting in Tennessee with the Pleasure Gang"
"Turkey Hunting in Tennessee with the Pleasure Gang"

Video.summary: Josh Dahlke makes the long-awaited journey to Hawaii as a critical piece to the Super Slam puzzle. Hawaii offers a turkey hunting adventure like none other, and there’s nobody resident companion than Jon Sabati – a Hawaii turkey hunting legend.
Video.title: "Volcano Gobbler"
